summary: Iteration 26: Tested Client Logos section, Stats section positioning, and Admin Client Logos CRUD. All features working correctly. Fixed route ordering bug for /reorder endpoint.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/homepage/client-logos returns list of active client logos
Backend: Client logos have required fields (name, image_url, is_active, order)
Backend: Default logos seeded (Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Meta, Apple)
Backend: /api/homepage/client-logos/all returns all logos for admin
Backend: POST /api/homepage/client-logos creates new logo
Backend: PUT /api/homepage/client-logos/{id} updates logo
Backend: DELETE /api/homepage/client-logos/{id} deletes logo
Backend: PUT /api/homepage/client-logos/reorder reorders logos
Backend: /api/homepage/content includes stats settings
Backend: Stats have value and label fields
Backend: /site.webmanifest accessible with correct content
Backend: /favicon.ico accessible
Frontend: Homepage shows 'Trusted by innovative companies worldwide' title
Frontend: Homepage displays 5 client logos (Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Meta, Apple)
Frontend: Client logos have grayscale effect
Frontend: Stats section (500+, 200+, 10+, 25+) is BELOW client logos section
Frontend: Admin Homepage Manager has 'Clients' tab
Frontend: Admin Clients tab shows Add Logo button
Frontend: Admin Clients tab shows Save Logos button
Frontend: Admin Clients tab shows 5 logo entries with all fields
Frontend: Admin Clients tab has Active toggles for each logo
Frontend: Admin Clients tab has Delete buttons for each logo
Frontend: Admin Clients tab has reorder arrows (up/down) for each logo
Frontend: Admin Clients tab has editable Section Title field
seed_data_creation: Default client logos (Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Meta, Apple) auto-seeded when admin accesses /all endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified: (1) Homepage Layout - Stats section (500+, 200+, 10+, 25+) is correctly positioned BELOW the client logos/trust section. (2) Client Logos Display - 5 default logos (Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Meta, Apple) displayed with grayscale hover effect. (3) Admin Client Logos Tab - Full CRUD functionality working: Add, Edit, Reorder, Toggle Active, Delete. (4) Favicon Setup - site.webmanifest and favicon files properly configured. Fixed route ordering bug where /reorder was being matched by /{logo_id} route.

bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Route ordering issue - /reorder route was defined AFTER /{logo_id} route, causing FastAPI to match 'reorder' as a logo_id
bug_fix_applied.verification: Reorder endpoint now returns 200 with success message

homepage_layout.description: Stats section correctly positioned below client logos section
